mapper.select: select id, category_name, summary, status, available_status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from commodity_category where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into commodity_category(id,category_name, summary, status, available_status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{categoryName}, #{summary}, #{status}, #{availableStatus}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into commodity_category(id,category_name, summary, status, available_status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.categoryName}, #{entity.summary}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into commodity_category(id,category_name, summary, status, available_status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.categoryName}, #{entity.summary}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update category_name = values(category_name), summary = values(summary), status = values(status), available_status = values(available_status), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
